rounds: The 6am necklace buy? No deliberation, no audience, just done — Joy Police didn't even get a word in. Painted toes on a Saturday, chemist aisle comparing nail shades without flinching — they showed up loud and he just... didn't care. Those are his. The bracelet though? Still on the Wish List. Not earned yet. That round's still open.
pattern: They're loudest before the moment — once he's already doing it, they've got nothing.
focus: Triniful Trial — wear the best-fitting piece for Matt.
